news.t: Coronavirus concerns batter travel stocks and ETFs
Travel and consumer ETFs on track for first day in a week after Norwegian Cruise Lines extends voyage suspensions

holdings.infoBox: FXD is an equity ETF with a total of 120 individual holdings. The top holdings are Macy's stock at 1.81%, Harley-Davidson at 1.71%, Delta Air Lines at 1.68%, Lithia Motors at 1.64%, and Penske Automotive Group at 1.60%.

overview.description: The First Trust Consumer Discretionary AlphaDEX Fund (FXD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the StrataQuant Consumer Discretionary index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US consumer discretionary stocks. The underlying index uses multi-factor selection and tiered equal-weighting. FXD was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.

data.text: Coronavirus concerns batter travel stocks and ETFs Exchange-traded funds with heavy travel industry exposure fell Friday, as President Donald Trump's COVID-19 diagnosis offered a stark reminder of the...

data.title: Travel and consumer ETFs on track for first day in a week after Norwegian Cruise Lines extends voyage suspensions
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to travel and tourism underperformed Wednesday
